---
title: "Question 5 - Paired t-test (IQ before vs after training)"
author: "Upayan Mazumder"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
alpha <- 0.05
```

## Question

IQ scores of 5 persons are measured before and after training. Test whether there is any change in IQ.

```{r data}
before <- c(110, 120, 123, 132, 125)
after <- c(120, 118, 125, 136, 121)

data.frame(Candidate = c("I", "II", "III", "IV", "V"),
           IQ_Before = before,
           IQ_After = after,
           Difference = after - before)
```

## Hypotheses

- H0: mean(After - Before) = 0
- H1: mean(After - Before) != 0

```{r paired-t-test}
result <- t.test(after, before, paired = TRUE, alternative = "two.sided")
result
```

```{r decision}
if (result$p.value < alpha) {
  cat("Decision: Reject H0 at 5% significance level.\n")
  cat("Conclusion: There is a significant change in IQ after training.")
} else {
  cat("Decision: Fail to reject H0 at 5% significance level.\n")
  cat("Conclusion: No significant change in IQ is detected after training.")
}
```
